description: Yellow and grey backpack with branding on the frontFlap pocket on the front with click lock closure, mesh side pocketsOne main zipped compartment with a mesh pocketHas a hose port with a bladder pouchHas a reinforced haul loop, padded shoulder and Back.Has a 2 litre Hydration bladder includedWarranty: 18 monthsPlease note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shown.
